content: Fix Cursor hook: output visible text when reminding USERINPUT, so user can verify hook works
notes: Added explicit 'Say [Hook: reminder received]' instruction to postToolUse. Increased frequency to every 3 calls. Strengthened stop hook message.

content: Reflect on why USERINPUT not executed; check if hook reminders were seen
notes: Root cause: additional_context is injected silently into context, not as visible message. Hooks were firing but blended into system context. Fix: explicit output instruction + increased frequency.

content: USERINPUT Cursor-specific prompt still at end of tool output, not system prompt - FIX
notes: Removed Cursor paragraph from zh.json ai_instruction. Added to brain_inject.py sessionStart hook as system context.

content: Develop logic/utils IDE environment detection (Cursor, other IDEs)
notes: Added detect_ide(), is_cursor_ide(), is_vscode() to logic/utils/system.py. Tested: correctly detects Cursor IDE.

content: Extract mature USERINPUT system prompts into logic/setup; inject on USERINPUT setup
notes: Cursor-specific parts use IDE detection. Temporary user additions stay out of setup.
